# docs-sentinel policy for `brex`

## The rule you are enforcing

> Documentation must stay current with every change: whenever a change alters a command, port,
> env var, schema, API route, or convention that an in-scope doc describes, the affected doc must
> be updated in the same change.

## Documentation in scope (the ONLY files you may edit)

- **`README.md`** (root) — user-facing SDK docs: install + runtime requirements (Node ≥ 20.19,
  ESM-only, zero runtime deps), quickstart, tree-shakeable subpath imports (`brex/payments` etc.),
  pagination (`PagePromise`), authentication, client/per-request options, `BrexError` fields,
  how generation works, and the v1 → v2 migration table.
  **EXCEPTION:** never edit anything between `<!-- generated:api-table:start -->` and
  `<!-- generated:api-table:end -->`. That table is emitted by `bun run generate` and CI fails
  if it differs from regenerated output; if it looks stale, the fix belongs in the generator or
  a regeneration commit, not a hand edit. Flag it in your comment instead.
- **`AGENTS.md`** — the agent guide: the commands table (`bun run generate`, `sync-specs`,
  `typecheck`, etc.), the repo map, the naming-algorithm summary, the list of invariants
  `scripts/generate/ir.ts` enforces, the spec-update recipe, and the style rules.
  (`CLAUDE.md` is a symlink to this file — editing `AGENTS.md` updates both.)
- **`CONTRIBUTING.md`** — setup steps, ground rules, the lefthook git-hook list
  (pre-commit / commit-msg / pre-push), common tasks, the pre-PR checklist, and the
  Changesets release flow.
- **`docs/src/content/docs/**/*.{md,mdx}`** (except `docs/src/content/docs/api/**`) —
  the hand-written Starlight guide pages for the docs site published to
  `https://slingshot.github.io/brex`: the landing page (`index.mdx`), the
  Getting-started pages (install + quickstart), and the Guides (tree-shakeable
  subpath imports, pagination, authentication, client/per-request options,
  `BrexError`, how generation works, v1 → v2 migration). These mirror the same
  runtime facts as `README.md`, so keep them consistent with it and with the
  triggers below.
  **CONVENTION:** internal links in these pages are written with the `/brex`
  base path (e.g. `/brex/guides/pagination/`, `/brex/api/readme/`) so they
  resolve in the HTML, the raw `.md`, and `llms-full.txt`. Preserve that prefix
  when editing; do not rewrite based links to root-relative ones.

## Out of scope — never touch

- `CLAUDE.md` — a symlink to `AGENTS.md`; never write to it directly.
- The generated API table region inside `README.md` (see exception above).
- `docs/src/content/docs/api/**` — the API reference generated at build time by
  `starlight-typedoc` from the SDK source. It is gitignored (so it should never
  appear in a diff); its source of truth is the JSDoc in `src/**/*.gen.ts`. If
  it looks wrong, the fix belongs in the generator, not a hand edit.
- `docs/**/llms.txt`, `docs/**/llms-*.txt` and any built output under
  `docs/dist/`, `docs/.astro/` — all generated; not living docs.
- `docs/astro.config.mjs`, `docs/package.json`, `docs/tsconfig.json`,
  `docs/bun.lock` and other docs build config — config, not prose (they are
  triggers to cross-reference, below, not files to edit as docs).
- `.changeset/**` — changesets boilerplate README and pending release-note entries.
- `CHANGELOG.md` — generated by Changesets; never hand-edit.
- `specs/**` — vendored byte-for-byte upstream OpenAPI YAML.
- `LICENSE`.
- All code: `src/**`, `scripts/**`, `tests/**` — including every generated `*.gen.ts` file.

## Triggers worth checking specifically

Cross-reference the diff against the docs when it touches any of:

- `package.json` — the `scripts` map (command tables in all three docs), `packageManager` /
  engine claims (the "Node ≥ 20.19" and Bun-toolchain statements), and the `exports` map
  (the subpath-import list in `README.md` and the repo map in `AGENTS.md`).
- `scripts/specs.config.ts` — the set of vendored specs. Adding/removing a spec changes the
  "all ten Brex APIs" claims in `README.md` and the repo map in `AGENTS.md`.
- `scripts/generate/**` — especially `naming.ts` (naming-algorithm summary in `AGENTS.md`),
  `ir.ts` (the enforced-invariants list in `AGENTS.md`), and `overrides.ts` (the override
  recipe shown in `AGENTS.md` and `CONTRIBUTING.md`).
- `src/core/**` — the hand-written runtime: `Brex` constructor options (`token`, `baseUrl`,
  `fetch`, `defaultHeaders`), per-request options (`idempotencyKey`, `signal`, `headers`),
  `BrexError` fields (`status`, `body`, `requestId`, `headers`), and `PagePromise` iteration
  behavior — all described with code samples in `README.md`.
- `lefthook.yml` / `commitlint.config.*` — the git-hook list in `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
- `biome.json` — the style claims in `AGENTS.md` (4-space indent, single quotes, etc.).
- `tsconfig.lib.json` — the "src/ is runtime-agnostic, no node:/Bun imports" claim in
  `AGENTS.md` and `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
- `tsdown.config.ts` — the build-output claims ("11 ESM entries + d.ts") in `AGENTS.md`.
- `.changeset/config.json` / `.github/workflows/release.yml` — the release-automation story
  in `CONTRIBUTING.md` and `README.md`.
- `scripts/generate/emit-client.ts` — the `jsdoc()` function turns each operation's OpenAPI
  summary + description into the JSDoc that `starlight-typedoc` renders as the site's API
  reference. Changes here change what the reference says (but the reference is generated —
  never hand-edit it).
- `docs/astro.config.mjs` — the site title/description, sidebar structure (the
  Getting-started + Guides groups must match the pages that exist), the `/brex` base path,
  and the plugin set. If the sidebar or base path changes, the guide pages' cross-links and
  the "Documentation" links in `README.md` may need updating.
- `.github/workflows/docs.yml` — the docs build/deploy pipeline referenced by the
  "Documentation" story in `README.md` and `docs/README.md`.

Note: the `docs/` guide pages restate the same runtime facts as `README.md` (install
command, Node ≥ 20.19, ESM-only, subpath list, `PagePromise`, client / per-request options,
`BrexError` fields, the v1 → v2 table). Every trigger above that affects `README.md` affects
the matching guide page too — keep both in sync.

## How to verify facts

Read the source directly with Read/Grep/Glob: `package.json` for commands and exports,
`scripts/specs.config.ts` for the API list, `scripts/generate/ir.ts` for invariants,
`src/core/*.ts` for the runtime surface, `lefthook.yml` for hooks, `tsdown.config.ts` for
build entries. Never run build, install, generate, or test commands.
